MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-12-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Daniel Stern, Esq. for plaintiff Mosser Companies with property manager, E. Cesares present.
Shawn T. O'Leary, Esq. appearing on limited scope representation for defendant Henry Reyes, who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for settlement conference. Settlement discussions held. The case settled. Parties enter into a signed Stipulation for Entry of Future Judgment and Settlement Agreement, which is not filed. Trial date vacated.

JPT: Andy Westley, Clerks Clark Banayad / Marsha Smith, not reported (218)
